name: nil_error_returns_200
description: no error should yield HTTP 200 with empty message

name: upstream_http_error_with_body
description: UpstreamError with non-200 status and body should surface status code and body in message

name: upstream_http_error_without_body
description: UpstreamError with empty body should still return status code and default message

name: upstream_connection_error
description: network-level error should map to -1 with upstream connection error prefix

name: upstream_connection_error_nil_cause
description: UpstreamConnectionError without cause should still map to -1 with default message

name: unknown_plain_error
description: non-upstream error (e.g. conversion failure) should map to 0 to distinguish from transport errors

name: unknown_context_canceled
description: context.Canceled is not an upstream failure; must fall through to unknown category (0)
